content:
+10 XP on an assignment of choice.
3 Students


📜 Prerequisites for Unlocking Items
✔ To claim “The Golden Fleece,” a student must have completed all readings and actively engaged in class at least once.
✔ To claim “The Winged Sandals,” a student must first win a debate.

✅ Why This Works:
• Ties weekly items & skills directly to literary themes.
• Adds scarcity—students must strategize when to claim rewards.
• Ensures progression-based unlocks prevent random power-ups.

📜 3. Realm Rerolls – Changing the Thematic Landscape
